title: Indulgent Kenyan Cheese Pie
description: A rich, cheese-pulled Kenyan style pie made with ready-rolled shortcrust pastry, finished al-dente with a golden crust and a satisfying stretch of melted cheese, perfect for a sattvic friendly meal.
instructions: Cut the ready-rolled shortcrust pastry to fit a 23cm pie tin and line the tin with the pastry, pressing firmly into corners.
Brush the pastry base lightly with olive oil and set aside.
Spread the chopped spinach evenly over the pastry base.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella and grated cheddar cheese over the spinach.
Sprinkle dried oregano, dried basil, and salt evenly over the cheese.
Bake for 15-18 minutes or until the cheese is melted, bubbly and the pastry edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven, let rest 5 minutes, then slice and serve.
